---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest edits, fixes, or additions to project documentation.
title: 'docs: [Short description of documentation update]'
labels: 'documentation'
assignees: ''
---

## Target Document / Page
Specify which document or API file needs to be updated (e.g. `docs/setup.md`, `README.md`, or a specific function docstring).

## The Problem
What is currently incorrect, outdated, or confusing? (e.g. "The local Supabase setup instructions are missing details on Google OAuth...")

## Suggested Fix
What should be added, changed, or removed? Write the updated paragraphs or code snippets here if possible.

## Additional Context
Any links, resources, or other references.
